payload.idea: Meta Ads manager for SMB with Omoikiri WhatsApp integration and Meta Ads Library competitor analytics

scope.target_user: small and mid-size business (SMB) running their own ads, NOT agencies, NOT solo freelancers
killer_features: Close the loop: Meta Ads → lead lands in WhatsApp → Omoikiri tracks the conversation → we attribute revenue back to ad creative/audience/campaign. Most SMB ads tools stop at ROAS/CPA — this one actually ties to sales confirmed in WhatsApp.
Meta Ads Library competitor analyst: scan competitors' active ads, cluster by theme/hook/format, surface what's working in SMB's niche before SMB launches own campaign.
scope.notes_to_architects: Omoikiri.AI is Adil's existing Railway service — Node.js + Supabase + Baileys WhatsApp + React dashboard. See projects/omoikiri/architecture.md. Integration should be tight: either shared Supabase project with proper RLS isolation, or clean API boundary. Decide with rationale.

source.note: Adil asked for a demo example of the blueprint flow during Block 5 work
